query:
SELECT DISTINCT u.url, u.status_code
        FROM crawl_urls u
        JOIN crawl_url_findings f ON f.crawl_url_id = u.id
        WHERE u.crawl_id = $1
          AND f.filter_key LIKE 'pagination%'
          AND (u.status_code IS NULL OR u.status_code < 200 OR u.status_code >= 300)
        ORDER BY u.url
        LIMIT $2
